sections.paragraph:
Original: צרעה

Transliteration: tsor‛âh

Phonetic: tsor-aw'

BDB Definition:

Zareah or Zoreah or Zorah = "hornet"
  1. a town in Dan, residence of Manoah and the home town of Samson

Origin: apparently another form for H6880

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Location
